global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a focus on the GlitchWave brand and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to unlock rare gear with no ads for the first week.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: GlitchWave logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo that reads 'GlitchWave' in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Empty slots
elements.description: Four empty square slots arranged in a grid pattern, suggesting a space for items or achievements.

elements.label: Empty slots
elements.description: Another set of four empty square slots arranged in a grid pattern, similar to the previous element.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Start now' in a bold font.

elements.label: Top element
elements.description: A small rectangular element at the top, possibly decorative or functional, with no visible text.

elements.label: Top element
elements.description: A small rectangular element at the top left, possibly decorative or functional, with no visible text.

elements.label: Middle element
elements.description: A small rectangular element in the center, possibly decorative or functional, with no visible text.

elements.label: Middle element
elements.description: A small rectangular element in the center left, possibly decorative or functional, with no visible text.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear message
elements.description: A prominent text message in the center of the ad that reads 'Unlock rare gear No ads in first week' in a bold font.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear No ads in first week

elements.label: GlitchWave headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'GlitchWave' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A bold, rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Start now' inviting user action.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner indicating 'UGC', possibly related to user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
